creator: media@gaogroupinc.com
text:
Toronto, Canada - GAO Tek Inc. (www.GAOTek.com) has released its highly reliable logic analyzer can sample up to 34 input channels and is capable of simultaneously observing a sizeable amount of data and data flow direction control information. The high performance logic analyzer offers a variety of digital information capture functions, a large memory capacity, triggers and triggered procedures. The logic analyzer is designed for capturing narrow pulse interference and the response of digital systems for debugging and verification.
This analyzer, model 5034, identifies error messages and locates faults in the source code. returns dynamic analysis results in binary, decimal, hexadecimal or ASCII format to facilitate debugging. A software CD with demo code in VC, CVI, VB, and LABVIEW is provided with the analyzer. 
The logic analyzer has a minimum time resolution of 2ns, an input voltage range of -60V to 60V and a logic threshold range from -6V to 6V. It runs under OS from Windows 2000 to Vista. Inputs include TTL, LVTTL, CMOS, LVCOMS, ECL, PECL and EIA.

About GAO Tek Inc.
GAO Tek Inc. (www.GAOTek.com) is a global leader in research, development and manufacturing of high performance telecommunication testers, electronic measurement instruments, embedded development tools and other electronic products that serve the needs of electronic professionals internationally.
